patterns.model_pattern: Use SQLAlchemy Base with UUID primary keys, mapped_column for fields, relationship() for FKs. Include created_at, updated_at, created_by_id. Use Enum classes for status fields.
patterns.schema_pattern: Request schemas use BaseModel with field validators. Response schemas extend CamelCaseModel (auto converts snake_case to camelCase). Use sanitize_string for text fields.
patterns.route_pattern: Use APIRouter, nested endpoints like /projects/{project_id}/resource. POST always nested. Use require_permission() decorator for RBAC. Include audit logging via create_audit_log().
patterns.service_pattern: Separate service layer for business logic. Use async/await. Services handle notifications via notify_project_admins() or broadcast_notification().
patterns.frontend_pattern: React functional components with TypeScript. Use MUI components, useTranslation() for i18n, react-hook-form for forms. Mobile-first RTL design.
patterns.migration_pattern: Alembic migrations numbered sequentially (056, 057, etc). Use descriptive names. Always include upgrade() and downgrade().

existing_implementations.description: Found existing inspection system with Finding model (similar to incident reporting), defect tracking system, and notification broadcasting system. Can reuse patterns from these modules.

reusable_components.photo_upload: Photos field in Finding model (JSONB list)

regulatory_context.required_fields: severity classification, photos, witness details, root cause analysis
regulatory_context.compliance_features: Safety KPI dashboard for regulatory reporting
